headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -61.5)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 81% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 150 quotes and an overwhelming 125 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting hard and pushing the score to 63.5.
• This sits in the upper half of the 158-day range (-1.7 to 166.6), so frustration is elevated but not at its peak.
• Optimism recovered from yesterday's low (-47.2 to -25.4), while Fears dipped further negative despite 18 strong-intensity quotes keeping it from falling lower.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
